violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
The hand-washing sink was lacking proper signage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
Chai concentrate observed stored on the floor in the storage closet. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025

Milk was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was placed on ice. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the lowboy refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Sponges observed at the 3 bay sink. Sponges may not be used on food contact surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The ice bucket was not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Hot water was not available at the handwashing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The condensate from the lowboy refrigeration unit is draining onto the floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2024
The establishment has an accumulation of dust and cobwebs. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
